overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The scene features futuristic architecture with heavy pink and purple neon signage, wet reflective streets, and transitions from narrow urban canyons to open plazas with pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial canyon with overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: driving forward through a narrow street lined with red metal facades and pink holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall building with red metal paneling and horizontal lines
large suspended screen displaying colorful advertisements above the street
enclosed glass walkway connecting buildings overhead
bright pink and purple illuminated signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow urban canyon with tall red buildings on the left and neon-lit structures on the right. Overhead digital billboards and glass pedestrian bridges span the street, while the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant pink and purple neon lights. No pedestrians are visible in this enclosed commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional street with holographic monuments and mixed commercial towers

events.description: large holographic statue becomes visible on the right building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing through the city street as the road opens up, passing large holographic displays and modern glass towers

entered.detail: massive projected figure of a person on the building facade
tall building with reflective glass windows and green neon accents

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the vehicle approaches a large holographic statue projected on a glass tower to the right. The red metal facades give way to modern glass architecture with green neon accents, while the road curves slightly through the illuminated canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath Kiroshi corporate signage

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath the Kiroshi overhead sign and glass walkway

agents.ego_description: driving under the Kiroshi overpass through a darker, covered section of roadway with concrete walls

entered.detail: large corporate sign with Japanese text spanning the road overhead
heavy concrete bridge structure with glass-enclosed walkway
building facade illuminated with green holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass beneath the Kiroshi corporate signage, transitioning from the open neon-lit street to a darker, enclosed concrete tunnel. The green holographic building remains visible on the right as the road continues through the sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with SOFTSYS building and commercial murals

events.description: exiting underpass into open plaza area with SOFTSYS building and visible pedestrians

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching the SOFTSYS building and navigating through the plaza area with pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the yellow crosswalk lines

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent SOFTSYS signage and multiple digital screens
large wall mural featuring the Red Bull logo and graffiti-style artwork
open paved area with yellow crosswalk markings and pedestrian activity

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a spacious pedestrian plaza dominated by the SOFTSYS building ahead. The Red Bull mural is visible on the right wall as pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The vehicle slows while approaching the intersection, with the wet streets continuing to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, neon-drenched urban corridor that gradually opens into a wider architectural plaza. It begins by gliding through a tight canyon of tall red buildings and glass pedestrian bridges, where the wet asphalt mirrors a vibrant palette of pink and purple neon. As the vehicle advances, the enclosed commercial atmosphere shifts, and the red metal facades give way to modern glass structures accented with green neon. The scene then expands as the road curves slightly, finally revealing a massive holographic statue projected onto a towering glass spire.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dark, enclosed urban underpass into a wide, neon-lit pedestrian plaza. It begins as the vehicle enters a sheltered concrete tunnel beneath Kiroshi corporate signage, with a green holographic building remaining visible to the right. As the vehicle moves forward, the enclosed space opens up, shifting from the shadows of the underpass into the bright expanse of a city square dominated by the SOFTSYS building. The scene then expands to reveal a Red Bull mural on the right wall and pedestrians along the sidewalks while the vehicle slows toward an intersection. Finally, the camera captures the wet streets reflecting the vibrant surrounding neon lights as the environment fully opens into the bustling plaza.
